'''Ritinki''' was a [[Bimm (disambiguation)|Bimm]] crimelord killed by the thief [[Cecil Noone]] and his crew during the theft of his yacht ''[[Asaari Wind]]'' around [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. His heirs each put out warrants on Noone's life.<ref name="GHH" />

==Appearances==

*{{GamerCite|1|Fair Prey}} {{Mo}}
